summary: Bug fix VERIFIED. Bottom tab bar icons are no longer clipped vertically. Measured bounding boxes for all 4 tabs (Início, Valores, Universos, Favoritos): tab bar height = 53px, tab cell height = 49px, each SVG icon = 25x25px positioned at y=789.5 with bottom at 814.5, well inside the tab bounds (tab_top=783, tab_bottom=832). No clipping top or bottom on any tab. Labels (Início/Valores/Universos/Favoritos) render fully legible below each icon. Tab bar is fixed at bottom (y=781, bottom=834, viewport=844) with Noite Ameixa (#2A1844) background. Active tab icon turns Dourado Estrela (#E9B24C) — confirmed via aria-selected=true and visual screenshots. Navigation works: tapping each tab goes to /, /valores, /universos, /favoritos. Scrollable container detected (scrollHeight 2188 / 2900 vs viewport 706) so Home content can be scrolled past the tab bar — no permanent occlusion. Non-blocking console warnings observed (see action_items): two duplicate React key errors (EUV-0001, EUV-0012) and deprecated style props (shadow*, pointerEvents).

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow'. Reference: somewhere in shared card/shadow styles.
Console warning: props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents.

action_items: Original tab-bar clipping bug is FIXED — no further action needed for that bug.
Fix duplicate React keys in lists rendering items with id EUV-0001 and EUV-0012 (likely /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/index.tsx 'Em destaque' or 'Para dormir tranquilo' carousels). Add unique keys.
Migrate deprecated 'shadow*' style props to 'boxShadow' (or platform-conditional) to silence RN web warnings.
Replace prop 'pointerEvents' with style.pointerEvents per RN deprecation.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx: tab bar height calculation (44 + extraBottom + 20) produces ~53px on web (insets.bottom=0), giving 49px per tab — sufficient room for 25px icon + 11px label without clipping. Good cross-platform sizing using useSafeAreaInsets.
IconSlot wrapper with flex:1 + center alignment is correctly applied to every tab (including the SVG-based MoonMark). Solid solution.
MoonMark SVG uses viewBox 0 0 48 48 and is given size=22 by the layout (size ?? 22) but rendered at 25x25 in DOM — likely due to default react-navigation icon size override. Cosmetically fine.

Tab 'Início' active color is hard-coded to colors.douradoEstrela inside its tabBarIcon callback, while makeIcon() relies on the passed `color`. This works because tabBarActiveTintColor is also douradoEstrela, but is slightly inconsistent. Optional cleanup: also use `color` for MoonMark.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tab-bar clipping bug is resolved at viewport 390x844. If retesting, also try 360x640 (smaller Android), 414x896 (iPhone Pro Max) and 768x1024 (tablet) to ensure the 44+insets formula stays robust. Note: the public URL https://dormir-stories.preview.emergentagent.com has a ~2s splash; wait before querying home-screen testID.
rca_of_issue: Original RCA: default React Navigation bottom tab bar height on web was ~49px while icon container padding + label combined exceeded that, clipping the top of icons. Fix in (tabs)/_layout.tsx adds a custom height (baseContent 44 + safe-area bottom + 20 paddingTop), wraps every icon in a flex-centered IconSlot, and tunes tabBarIconStyle/tabBarItemStyle/tabBarLabelStyle so the 25px icon + 11px label both fit cleanly. Verified via DOM bounding boxes and visual screenshots — no clipping on any of the 4 tabs.
